title: calpidisca denticulata
intro: Calpidisca denticulata, also known as the toothbrush tree, is a species of plant in the family Combretaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Calpidisca denticulata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to promote digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Calpidisca denticulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
